sections.paragraph:
Original: אצל

Transliteration: 'atsêl

Phonetic: aw-tsale'

BDB Definition:

Azel = "reserved"
  1. a place near Jerusalem, site presently unknown (noun proper locative)
  2. a Benjamite descendant of Saul and Jonathan (noun proper masculine)

Origin: from H680

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Location
